This file lists high-signal Knitly pages for language model discovery.

https://knitly.io/
https://knitly.io/intent/
https://knitly.io/intent/families
https://knitly.io/intent/homeschool
https://knitly.io/intent/church-groups
https://knitly.io/intent/small-communities
https://knitly.io/intent/close-friends

Priority topics covered:
- self-hosted social network for families
- invite-only social app for families and friends
- private social network for communities
- homeschool community social app
- church groups social networking platform
